title: mimulus guttatus var. gracilis
intro: Mimulus guttatus var. gracilis, also known as the graceful monkey flower, is a variety of the Western monkey flower, a flowering plant native to western North America. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Mimulus guttatus var. gracilis include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
